title: Andamaina Jeevitham

desc: A fantasy adventure introduces a mystical world where characters embark on a journey of destiny, power, and discovery, facing challenges and uncovering hidden truths.

title: Oh Baby
desc: Savitri blames God for her troubles. She then transforms into a beautiful girl.

title: Atharintiki Daaredi
desc: A man sets out on a mission to reunite his family and protect their honor. A mix of emotion, strength, and reconciliation leads the journey forward.

title: Su From So

title: Arjun
desc: Arjun helps his sister's love interest uncover his in-laws' deadly plan.

title: Krishna Babu
desc: Krishna, from a wealthy family, responsibly looks after everyone, including his brother Vijay. He falls for a beautiful woman but his troubled past stops him from marrying her.

desc: A fun compilation of back-to-back hilarious Telugu movie scenes, bringing nonstop laughter with the funniest moments, comic sequences, and iconic reactions.

title: Bharat Ane Nenu
desc: Inexperienced Bharat becomes Andhra Pradesh's CM, striving to reform society.

title: Mask
desc: To woo the police commissioner's daughter is no mean task as martial arts expert Anandan finds out.

title: Ayyaare
desc: Venkates is in love with a girl.Her dad reneges on his promise to let them marry

desc: A mysterious traveler slips into Karachi's underworld, rises with precision, and secretly tears apart the ISI Underworld nexus from within, balancing danger with true justice.

title: Calvary Darshanam
